# Gengage Assistant FE — UX Gap Report

**Generated by:** Claude + Gemini QA Loop
**Started:** 2026-03-09
**Verified:** 2026-03-10
**Status:** VERIFIED — 101 issues across all 6 merchants

## Summary

| Category | Count |
|----------|-------|
| VISUAL   | 21    |
| UX       | 26    |
| MOBILE   | 12    |
| A11Y     | 8     |
| LOADING  | 5     |
| COMPONENT| 19    |
| THEME    | 13    |
| **TOTAL**| **104**|

### Merchants Tested

| Merchant | Chat | SimRel | QNA | Status |
|----------|------|--------|-----|--------|
| koctascomtr | Working | Working | Working | Full test |
| n11com | Working | Empty | Working | Full test |
| hepsiburadacom | Broken | Empty | Partial | Backend issue |
| arcelikcomtr | Working | Empty | Partial | Full test |
| yatasbeddingcomtr | Working | Working | Working | Full test |
| penticomtr | Broken | Empty | Empty | Backend issue |

### Removed During Verification

| Type | Count | Details |
|------|-------|---------|
| Duplicates | 8 | GAP-006/016(→096), 030/075(→092), 061(→021), 062(→013), 079(→004), 082(→099) |
| False positives | 3 | GAP-044(not visible), 053(not visible), 102(code has aria-live) |
| Not widget issues | 3 | GAP-024(demo shell), 073(intentional), 095(dev-only) |
| **Total removed** | **14** | |

### Corrections

- GAP-050: P0→P3 (scroll-boundary clipping, not rendering bug)
- GAP-085: "95%"→"~80%" (measured from CSS)

---

## GAP-001: [UX] "Kararsız mı kaldın?" comparison overlay persists across context changes
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Opened drawer, then searched "banyo dolabı önerir misin" — overlay from bread basket product remained
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** Overlay should dismiss when conversation context changes (new search topic)
- **Actual:** Overlay persists from initial product (ekmek sepeti) even after browsing bathroom cabinets
- **Severity:** P1
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-002: [UX] Retry on error creates duplicate user message bubble
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Clicked "Aynalı ve Lavabolu Banyo Setleri" grouping card → error → clicked "Tekrar Dene"
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-07-retry-error.png
- **Expected:** Retry should resend the same message without duplicating the user bubble
- **Actual:** "Aynalı ve Lavabolu Banyo Setleri" appears twice as sent messages with separate error blocks
- **Severity:** P1
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-003: [COMPONENT] AI grouping card click triggers error — no graceful fallback
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Clicked "Aynalı ve Lavabolu Banyo Setleri" grouping card after search response
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-06-error-state.png
- **Expected:** Clicking a grouping card should navigate or show filtered results
- **Actual:** "Bir hata oluştu. Lütfen tekrar deneyin." — error with retry button. Retry also fails.
- **Severity:** P1
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-004: [COMPONENT] Review text product links have href="#" — non-functional
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Asked "bu ürünün yorumları nasıl" — response has product name links
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-08-reviews-response.png
- **Expected:** Product name links should navigate to product detail in the panel or to the product page
- **Actual:** Links like "Banos Banyo Roomart Bd2" and "Kumru Banyo Dolabı" have href="#" — they look interactive but go nowhere
- **Severity:** P1
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-005: [UX] Previous product summary persists at top of chat after context change
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Started with bread basket product, then searched for bathroom cabinets
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** When conversation shifts to a completely different product category, the initial product summary should be clearly demarcated or collapsed
- **Actual:** "Tekno-Tel Ekmek Sepeti" summary stays at the top while discussing bathroom cabinets — confusing context mixing
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-007: [MOBILE] Panel takes ~35% of mobile screen height, severely limiting chat area
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** mobile (390x844)
- **Step:** Opened drawer on mobile with panel visible
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-mobile-02-drawer-open.png
- **Expected:** On mobile, chat should be the primary view with panel accessible via toggle/swipe
- **Actual:** Panel takes ~35% of the 844px height, product image is cropped, and chat area is cramped — only ~4 messages visible
- **Severity:** P1
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-008: [MOBILE] Product image heavily cropped in mobile panel view
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** mobile (390x844)
- **Step:** Opened drawer on mobile — panel shows product detail
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-mobile-02-drawer-open.png
- **Expected:** Product image should be fully visible or have a clear "tap to expand" affordance
- **Actual:** Only the top portion of the bathroom cabinet image is visible with dimension annotations — no way to see the full product
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-009: [UX] Error message auto-scrolled out of view on desktop
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Grouping card click → error → chat auto-scrolled to suggested actions
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-06-error-state.png
- **Expected:** Error messages should remain visible so the user sees what went wrong
- **Actual:** Chat auto-scrolled past the error to show suggested actions, hiding the "Bir hata oluştu" message
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-010: [UX] "Benzerlerini Bul" button overlays product image in detail panel
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Clicked a product card to view detail in left panel
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-09-product-detail.png
- **Expected:** "Find Similar" button should be clearly positioned without covering image content
- **Actual:** Button overlays the top-right of the product image, potentially covering important product details/dimensions
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-011: [UX] Review text is dense wall of paragraphs — hard to scan
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Asked "bu ürünün yorumları nasıl"
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-08-reviews-response.png
- **Expected:** Review summaries should use visual structure (star ratings, pros/cons cards, key quotes)
- **Actual:** Long dense paragraphs per product — each review is 3-4 lines of continuous text. Requires significant reading effort.
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-012: [VISUAL] Star rating rendering inconsistency — mixed filled/empty star characters
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Viewing product cards in search results panel
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** Consistent star rendering across all product cards (same glyph style)
- **Actual:** Some cards show ★★★★★ (filled), others ☆☆☆☆☆ (empty) for 0-rating products, and a half-star uses nested ★ inside ☆ (ref e1910/e1911 overlay technique)
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-013: [VISUAL] Product card title truncation too aggressive in search results
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Viewing bathroom cabinet search results in left panel
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** Product titles should show enough text to differentiate products (2-3 lines)
- **Actual:** "Roomart Banos Banyo Roomart Bd2 Ayaksız 2..." is truncated to 1.5 lines — hard to tell products apart
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-014: [UX] Panel header "Sorduğunuz Ürün Modelleri" misleading when showing single product
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Clicked a specific product card — panel shows product detail
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-09-product-detail.png
- **Expected:** Header should update to product name or "Ürün Detayı" when showing a single product
- **Actual:** Header still shows "Sorduğunuz Ürün Modelleri" (plural) when viewing a single product detail
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-015: [UX] "İlk üçü detaylıca karşılaştır" button appears before user scrolls review content
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** After receiving reviews response — compare button appears between response and suggested actions
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-08-reviews-response.png
- **Expected:** Comparison CTA should appear after user has read the reviews, not before
- **Actual:** Orange "İlk üçü detaylıca karşılaştır" button appears immediately, overlapping with review content on smaller viewports
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-017: [VISUAL] Price format inconsistency — original vs discounted price formatting
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Viewing product cards in search results
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** Consistent price formatting (both with or both without comma-separated decimals)
- **Actual:** Original price "2.809 TL" has no decimals, discounted price "2.668,55 TL" has decimals. Inconsistent formatting.
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-018: [A11Y] Suggested action icons inconsistent — some (ⓘ) and some (☆)
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Looking at suggested actions below chat response
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-08-reviews-response.png
- **Expected:** All suggested actions should use the same icon style for consistency
- **Actual:** "Müşteri Favorisi Hangisi?" uses a star icon (☆) while others use info icon (ⓘ) — inconsistent visual language
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-019: [UX] No indication that left panel is scrollable — no scroll affordance
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Viewing search results in left panel — 6 products visible, more below
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** Visual scroll indicator (scrollbar, fade, "scroll for more" hint) in the left panel
- **Actual:** Bottom row of product cards is cut off with no visible scroll affordance — user may not realize there are more products below
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-020: [LOADING] No skeleton/shimmer shown while streaming loading steps
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Sent "banyo dolabı önerir misin" — streaming loading state
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-04-streaming.png
- **Expected:** Skeleton cards or shimmer placeholders while products are being fetched
- **Actual:** Loading steps show text only ("✓ Banyo dolabı önerilerine bakıyorum...", "● Banyo dolabı kategorilerini genişleterek...") — no visual skeleton for the panel content
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-021: [UX] Navigation arrows (← →) in panel header lack tooltips or clear affordance
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Panel open with ← → buttons in the header
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-03-drawer-open.png
- **Expected:** Tooltips or labels indicating what "back" and "forward" navigate to
- **Actual:** Plain ← and → arrows with no tooltip, no breadcrumb, no history indication. "Geri" button is disabled without explanation.
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-022: [COMPONENT] "İncele" button opens external link without warning
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Viewing product detail in panel, "İncele" button visible
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-09-product-detail.png
- **Expected:** External link should have indicator icon (↗) or open in new tab warning
- **Actual:** "İncele" button links to koctas.com.tr product page — clicking navigates away from the current page with no warning
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-023: [VISUAL] "Stokta" (In Stock) badge is small and low contrast
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Viewing product cards and product detail
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-09-product-detail.png
- **Expected:** Stock status should be clearly visible (larger badge or bolder styling)
- **Actual:** Small green "Stokta" text badge — low visual weight compared to price and title
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-025: [MOBILE] Chat launcher button proximity to "Favorilere Ekle" on mobile
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** mobile (390x844)
- **Step:** Viewing product section on mobile — launcher and buttons overlap zone
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-mobile-01-page-load.png
- **Expected:** Launcher should not overlap with or be too close to page CTA buttons
- **Actual:** Orange chat launcher sits very close to "Favorilere Ekle" button — potential mis-tap target
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-026: [UX] Comparison prompt ("Kararsız mı kaldın?") appears immediately on drawer open
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** First time opening drawer
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-03-drawer-open.png
- **Expected:** Comparison prompt should appear after user has browsed 2+ products, not on first open
- **Actual:** "Kararsız mı kaldın? Ürünleri seçip karşılaştırabilirsin" appears immediately, taking space before user has even started shopping
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-027: [LOADING] Loading step indicators show text-only — no animated progress
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Message sent, waiting for response
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-04-streaming.png
- **Expected:** Animated dots, spinner, or progress bar alongside step text
- **Actual:** Static "✓" checkmark and "●" bullet with text. The bullet should pulse or animate to show active processing.
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-028: [A11Y] Panel toggle button uses "»" and "«" chevrons with no label visible
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Panel toggle between two-pane views
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-03-drawer-open.png
- **Expected:** Visible label or tooltip ("Show panel" / "Hide panel")
- **Actual:** Only "»"/"«" character is shown — accessible name "Paneli aç/kapat" exists in ARIA but no visual label for sighted users
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-029: [COMPONENT] SimRel product card titles all identical in page view
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Scrolled to "Benzer Ürünler" section on the page (not in drawer)
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-02-full-page.png
- **Expected:** Product cards should show distinct, differentiating titles
- **Actual:** All cards show "Mat Siyah Yuvarlak Ekmek Sepeti..." — truncated identically, making it impossible to distinguish products without looking at images
- **Severity:** P1
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-031: [COMPONENT] SimRel quantity stepper cart button uses emoji "🛒" not icon
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** SimRel product cards in drawer panel
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-03-drawer-open.png
- **Expected:** Cart icon should be a consistent SVG/icon matching the brand's design system
- **Actual:** Cart button uses "🛒" emoji which renders differently per OS/browser and looks unprofessional
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-032: [VISUAL] Discount badge percentage inconsistency — some use % prefix, product detail doesn't
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Comparing search results panel cards with product detail view
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-05-response-complete.png
- **Expected:** Consistent discount display (always show % badge or always calculate from price)
- **Actual:** Search result cards show "%10", "%5" badges. Product detail view doesn't show any discount badge — only strikethrough price.
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-033: [A11Y] Error message "Bir hata oluştu" lacks error role or alert semantics
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Error after clicking grouping card
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-mobile-03-panel-collapsed.png
- **Expected:** Error should use role="alert" or aria-live="assertive" so screen readers announce it
- **Actual:** Error is rendered as a generic div — screen readers won't announce the error automatically
- **Severity:** P2
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-034: [UX] QNA widget "Başka bir şey sor" has different styling than other question buttons
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Full page view, QNA section
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-desktop-02-full-page.png
- **Expected:** All QNA action buttons should have consistent styling
- **Actual:** "Başka bir şey sor" is outlined (white bg, orange border) while others are filled (orange bg, white text) — visually inconsistent
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-035: [MOBILE] Chat input area takes significant bottom space on mobile
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
- **Viewport:** mobile (390x844)
- **Step:** Mobile drawer open with panel collapsed
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/koctascomtr-mobile-03-panel-collapsed.png
- **Expected:** Input area should be compact, maximizing message viewing area
- **Actual:** Input bar with image upload, text field, and send button takes ~60px height — combined with suggested actions above, leaves limited reading area
- **Severity:** P3
- **Source:** Claude

## GAP-036: [COMPONENT] SimRel fails silently on n11com — empty section, no error shown
- **Merchant:** n11com
- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Page load — "Benzer Ürünler" section
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/n11com-desktop-02-full-page.png
- **Expected:** Error message with retry button when SimRel products fail to load
- **Actual:** Console error but empty white section visible to user — no error message, no retry
- **Severity:** P0
- **Source:** Claude

- **Viewport:** desktop
- **Step:** Page load — "Benzer Ürünler" section

## GAP-038: [COMPONENT] Hepsiburada chat completely broken — every query returns same error
- **Merchant:** hepsiburadacom
- **Viewport:** both
- **Step:** Opened drawer, typed any query
- **Screenshot:** .claude/tmp/hepsiburadacom-desktop-03-error-repeat.png

- **Actual:** Every message gets "Bu ürün bilgisi şu an kullanılamıyor" — can't help with anything

## GAP-039: [UX] Hepsiburada drawer has no panel — chat-only with no context
- **Merchant:** hepsiburadacom

- **Expected:** If product data fails, show helpful empty state

## GAP-040: [UX] Hepsiburada error has no suggested actions or recovery path
- **Merchant:** hepsiburadacom
- **Viewport:** both

- **Expected:** Show helpful suggestions, retry, or categories

## GAP-060: [VISUAL] Quantity stepper height mismatch with ATC button
- **Merchant:** koctascomtr
